scope: Independent z3 (NRA) cross-check that none of the 15 n=8 selected-witness survivor classes has a strictly convex octagon realization: for each class the equal-distance + perpendicular-bisector constraints together with strict convexity (label order) are UNSAT. Independent in the decision procedure (z3 NRA vs the existing Groebner / cyclic-order arguments), covering all 15 classes including the four Groebner-dependent ones (3,4,5,14) that the SymPy-free recheck skips. Repo-local exact-obstruction cross-check pending external review; not a general proof of Erdos Problem #97, not a counterexample, not an official/global status update.
